title: Toy Story 5
tmdbOverview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.
synopsis: Toy Story 5 (2026) is a animation, family and comedy film from United States. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on TMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
